faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to common questions about our services and policies.

questions.a: We offer free shipping on orders over $50 within the continental US. International shipping is available with additional charges.

questions.q: How can I track my order?
questions.a: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also track orders in your account dashboard.
We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unused and in original packaging for a full refund.
Yes! Our customer service team is available Monday-Friday 9AM-6PM EST via phone, email, or live chat.
